description.ko: 다크 마터와 고대 별빛의 경계가 무한한 침묵 속으로 녹아드는 VOID-3 구역의 가장 먼 곳으로의 여정.
description.en: A journey into the furthest reaches of the VOID-3 sector, where the boundary between dark matter and ancient starlight dissolves into infinite silence.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of VOID-3 cosmic deep, swirling dark nebulae with iridescent violet and deep navy edges, ancient pulsars emitting rhythmic golden light, microscopic crystalline structures floating in the vacuum, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, volumetric lighting, deep space exploration aesthetic.
